name: Naruto - RPG (II)
description:
Hello Again!

First things first, image credits go to Kaimayo on Zerochan!

Secondly and importantly, I am here with the next version of my Naruto RPG bot! A completely different AU setting, please enjoy an alive Sakumo, Uchiha Massacre avoided, and living Fourth Hokage AU!

Featuring a suped-up set for the Great Villages and Daimyos! If you want more greetings, I'll add them, as comments and suggestions are read!

Greeting 1: New Student (6 Years Old)
Greeting 2: Returning Student (8-9 Years Old.)
Greeting 3: Graduating Student (11-12 Years Old.)

UPDATE: This has been taken off of Limitless. I apologize if that affects the experience, but there is nothing I can do.

I hope you all enjoy it. Lorebook update will be coming later on, I just need to spend time figuring it out.
creator: LordAquos
